with the blessings of family & the warmth of those we love

Amarnath ❤️ Devika

are tying the knot

Two souls who found in each other not just a partner, but a home — steady, warm, and beautifully ours.

The Invitation

A Morning of New Beginnings

Some bonds are not built in a day — they are grown,
quietly and surely, like roots finding their ground.
We found that ground in each other,
and with grateful hearts, we invite you to witness the bloom.

Come, stand beside us as we step into forever —
your presence is the blessing that makes this moment whole.

— with love, Amarnath & Devika
